# testSuiteDidStop(_:)

**Instance Method**

Notifies the observer when a test suite stops.

## Declaration

```swift
func testSuiteDidStop(_ testRun: XCTestRun!)
```

## Parameters

- **testRun**: The test run object calling this method.

## Monitoring Test Activity

- **testCaseDidFail(_:withDescription:inFile:atLine:)**: Notifies the observer when a test case fails.
- **testCaseDidStart(_:)**: Notifies the observer when a test case starts.
- **testCaseDidStop(_:)**: Notifies the observer when a test case stops.
- **testSuiteDidStart(_:)**: Notifies the observer when a test suite starts.
